tasks.label: CTOA: Preflight Mobile Console Env
args: $required = 'CTOA_OWNER_USER','CTOA_OWNER_PASSWORD','CTOA_OPERATOR_USER','CTOA_OPERATOR_PASSWORD','CTOA_MOBILE_TOKEN'; $missing = $required | Where-Object { [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace((Get-Item -Path "Env:$_" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Value) }; if ($missing.Count -gt 0) { Write-Error ('Missing required env vars: ' + ($missing -join ', ')); exit 1 }; Write-Host 'Mobile console env preflight PASS'

tasks.label: CTOA: Start CTOAi Free Mode
args: $envPath = Join-Path (Get-Location) '.env'; if (-not (Test-Path $envPath)) { Write-Error 'Missing .env file'; exit 1 }; Get-Content $envPath | Where-Object { $_ -and -not $_.StartsWith('#') -and $_ -match '=' } | ForEach-Object { $name, $value = $_ -split '=', 2; [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable($name, $value, 'Process') }; & .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8011

tasks.label: CTOA: Validate Pack
tasks.command: echo CTOA AI Toolkit pack is configured

tasks.label: CTOA: Validate API Cost Optimizer Agent
CTOA: Launch Pack
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts/ops/ctoa_update_gate.py; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; echo Launching CTOA pack...; if (Test-Path .\agents\ctoa-agents.yaml) { echo Agents OK } else { echo Agents missing; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path .\prompts\braver-library.yaml) { echo Prompts OK } else { echo Prompts missing; exit 1 }; if (Test-Path .\.github\workflows\ctoa-pipeline.yml) { echo CI Workflow OK } else { echo CI Workflow missing; exit 1 }; echo Launch dry-run PASS"

tasks.label: CTOA: Sprint-070 Local Archive Cleanup
args: cd /d C:\Users\zycie\CTOAi && mkdir _local_archive\sprint-070\training 2>nul && mkdir _local_archive\sprint-070\artifacts 2>nul && mkdir _local_archive\sprint-070\labs 2>nul && if exist training\ctoa-merged move /Y training\ctoa-merged _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\ctoa-1.5b-q4km.gguf move /Y training\ctoa-1.5b-q4km.gguf _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-output move /Y training\kaggle-output _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-output-final move /Y training\kaggle-output-final _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-output-v24 move /Y training\kaggle-output-v24 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-output-v25 move /Y training\kaggle-output-v25 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-output-v26 move /Y training\kaggle-output-v26 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-output-v3 move /Y training\kaggle-output-v3 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\kaggle-upload move /Y training\kaggle-upload _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\logs-v4 move /Y training\logs-v4 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\logs-v5 move /Y training\logs-v5 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\logs-v6 move /Y training\logs-v6 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist training\logs-v7 move /Y training\logs-v7 _local_archive\sprint-070\training\ && if exist artifacts\enc3 move /Y artifacts\enc3 _local_archive\sprint-070\artifacts\ && if exist labs\projects move /Y labs\projects _local_archive\sprint-070\labs\ && if exist labs\__pycache__ move /Y labs\__pycache__ _local_archive\sprint-070\labs\ && (echo done>_local_archive\sprint-070\move.ok)

tasks.label: CTOA: Sprint-070 Cleanup Documentation Sync
args: $root='C:\Users\zycie\CTOAi'; $gitignore=Join-Path $root '.gitignore'; $cleanupDoc=Join-Path $root 'docs\REPO_CLEANUP_WAVES.md'; $progressDoc=Join-Path $root 'docs\history\sprints\SPRINT-070-PROGRESS.md'; $archiveRoot=Join-Path $root '_local_archive\sprint-070'; $moved=@('training/ctoa-merged','training/ctoa-1.5b-q4km.gguf','training/kaggle-output','training/kaggle-output-final','training/kaggle-output-v24','training/kaggle-output-v25','training/kaggle-output-v26','training/kaggle-output-v3','training/kaggle-upload','training/logs-v4','training/logs-v5','training/logs-v6','training/logs-v7','artifacts/enc3','labs/projects','labs/__pycache__'); $manifest=[ordered]@{ archivedAt=(Get-Date).ToString('s'); archiveRoot='_local_archive/sprint-070'; moved=$moved; keptInPlace=@('bot','tools/rosetta-assembler'); rationale=@{ bot='active source surface'; 'tools/rosetta-assembler'='configured in .gitmodules as submodule'; labs='top-level directory left empty after archival of payload'; training='only source-side assets remain in place' } }; $manifest | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 6 | Set-Content -Path (Join-Path $archiveRoot 'manifest.json') -Encoding UTF8; $gitText=Get-Content $gitignore -Raw; if($gitText -notmatch '(?m)^_local_archive/$'){ Add-Content -Path $gitignore -Value "`r`n# Local archive created during repo cleanup`r`n_local_archive/" -Encoding UTF8 }; $cleanupText=Get-Content $cleanupDoc -Raw; if($cleanupText -notmatch '## Wave 2 and Wave 3 Executed'){ Add-Content -Path $cleanupDoc -Value "`r`n## Wave 2 and Wave 3 Executed`r`n`r`n- Archive root: _local_archive/sprint-070`r`n- Executed moves:`r`n  - training/ctoa-merged`r`n  - training/ctoa-1.5b-q4km.gguf`r`n  - training/kaggle-output`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-final`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v24`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v25`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v26`r`n  - training/kaggle-output-v3`r`n  - training/kaggle-upload`r`n  - training/logs-v4`r`n  - training/logs-v5`r`n  - training/logs-v6`r`n  - training/logs-v7`r`n  - artifacts/enc3`r`n  - labs/projects`r`n  - labs/__pycache__`r`n- Kept in place:`r`n  - bot (active source surface)`r`n  - tools/rosetta-assembler (.gitmodules submodule)`r`n- Result:`r`n  - training now keeps only source-side assets`r`n  - labs top-level payload removed`r`n  - artifacts forensic payload removed from main repo paths`r`n" -Encoding UTF8 }; $progressText=Get-Content $progressDoc -Raw; if($progressText -notmatch '## Cleanup Execution Completed'){ Add-Content -Path $progressDoc -Value "`r`n## Cleanup Execution Completed`r`n`r`n- Archive root created: _local_archive/sprint-070`r`n- Physical cleanup completed for training heavy outputs, artifacts payload, and labs payloads`r`n- Verification result:`r`n  - moved targets verified out of original paths`r`n  - training left with source-side assets only`r`n  - labs left empty`r`n- Explicit keep decisions preserved:`r`n  - bot`r`n  - tools/rosetta-assembler (submodule path from .gitmodules)`r`n" -Encoding UTF8
